result=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-m','pytest','-q','tests/test_hosted_control.py','tests/test_hosted_console.py'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=120,check=False); assert result.returncode==0,result.stdout+result.stderr; assert ' passed' in result.stdout
